headline: 新片低迷，经典续作霸榜
headlineEn: New Releases Slump, Classic Sequels Dominate
summary: 今日无新片上映，本周仅1部新片。《痴迷》与《福尔摩斯小姐3》持续领跑热搜，多部续集及IP作品占据本周趋势榜。
summaryEn: No movies released today, only 1 new film this week. 'Obsession' and 'Enola Holmes 3' continue to top trending, with sequels and IPs dominating the weekly chart.

industryHighlights.text: 今日电影市场零新片上映，暑期档热度放缓。
industryHighlights.en: Zero new releases today, summer box office slows.

industryHighlights.text: 《痴迷》连续多日霸占热搜榜首，话题度不减。
《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》等大片定档，引影迷期待。
industryHighlights.en: Upcoming blockbusters like 'Spider-Man: Fresh New Day' spark anticipation.

industryHighlights.text: 经典IP续作《海洋奇缘：启航》即将上映，预售开启。
